subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Dr. C. et al, spoken on 1919-12-18
subcodes.first_line: This is not a correct translation. I wrote that his highness the Supreme (Báb) was the forerunner like John the Baptist, like the dawn. The Blessed Beauty is the sun and I am ‘Abdu'l-Bahá and no one should go beyond that.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @twin Manifestations, @John the Baptist
